title: Dyson, Michelle - Director General, Department of Health and Social Care - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Dyson left her role at the Department of Health and Social Care in August 2025.  Chief Executive Officer, Alzheimer’s Society  Ms Dyson sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the Alzheimer’s Society. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was announced later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
